positive: Minimalist abstract forest scene, highly stylized ink drawing aesthetic. A group of interlocking, stylized woodland creatures (deer, fox, owl, rabbit) forming a circular, repeating pattern. The silhouettes must be clean and bold, printed in deep indigo and moss green against a cream background. Focus on negative space and interlocking shapes. Line art with subtle, organic watercolor wash accents within the negative space. Designed for seamless tiling on apparel. Central, balanced composition. Flat, matte finish. Studio lighting, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, low detail, signature, copyright, logo, messy, dirty, realistic, photo, CGI, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise
